NCT02946463.label: Outcome
NCT02946463.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT02946463.text: After a 4-week run-in phase in which all patients received pegcetacoplan plus eculizumab, we randomly assigned patients to subcutaneous pegcetacoplan monotherapy (41 patients) or intravenous eculizumab (39 patients).

NCT01892345.label: Outcome
NCT01892345.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT01892345.text: Adjudicated relapses occurred in 3 of 96 patients (3%) in the eculizumab group and 20 of 47 (43%) in the placebo group (hazard ratio, 0.06; 95% confidence interval [CI], 0.02 to 0.20; P<0.001).
